api_key.description: Reply.io legacy API key, sent as the X-Api-Key header for v1 streams. Never logged.

base_url.description: Reply.io API base URL override for tests or proxies. Defaults to the current v3 API host; legacy v1 streams include /v1 in their paths.

updated_after.description: Optional updated-after filter applied to every stream's request, matching legacy's config-driven query filter.

created_after.description: Optional created-after filter applied to every stream's request.

email.description: Optional email filter applied to every stream's request.

status.description: Optional status filter applied to every stream's request.

bearer_token.description: Optional Reply.io v3 bearer token/API key. When provided, v3 streams and writes use Authorization: Bearer.

calendarId.description: Path parameter calendarId for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

contact_id.description: Path parameter contact_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

document_id.description: Path parameter document_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

email_account_id.description: Path parameter email_account_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

id.description: Path parameter id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

jobId.description: Path parameter jobId for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

knowledge_base_id.description: Path parameter knowledge_base_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

link_id.description: Path parameter link_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

linkedInAccountId.description: Path parameter linkedInAccountId for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

media_id.description: Path parameter media_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

playbook_id.description: Path parameter playbook_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

reengagement_card_id.description: Path parameter reengagement_card_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

reply_handler_id.description: Path parameter reply_handler_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

sequence_id.description: Path parameter sequence_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

step_id.description: Path parameter step_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

style_file_id.description: Path parameter style_file_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

tagId.description: Path parameter tagId for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.

variant_id.description: Path parameter variant_id for documented Reply.io v3 endpoints.
